channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Stats SA Reports on Rising Black Middle-Class and Poverty Trends in South Africa
item.description: Minister in the Presidency, Khumbudzo Ntshavheni, highlighted the progress made in South Africa’s democratic journey, noting significant growth in earnings among black South Africans. Stats SA data sh...

item.title: Senator Bato dela Rosa Requests PNP Protective Custody Amid ICC Warrant
item.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa has formally requested to be placed under the protective custody of the Philippine National Police (PNP), according to Acting Senate Sergeant-at-Arms Mao Aplasca. The r...

item.title: Official Lotto Results for May 14, 2026
item.description: On May 14, 2026, ABS-CBN published the official results for the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) lotto draws. The article provides Filipinos with the winning numbers for various lotto game...

item.title: Ayana TV Show Cast: Star Actors and Rising Talents on Citizen TV
item.description: Ayana, the popular Citizen TV series that premiered on 6th October 2025, features a blend of established Kenyan actors and upcoming talent. The main cast includes Brenda Wairimu as Asha, Dennis Musyok...

item.title: Tanzania Allocates 2.87 Trillion Shillings to Transport Infrastructure and Development
item.description: DODOMA — Tanzania government don set aside 2.872 trillion shillings for the Ministry of Transport for 2026/27, focusing heavily on big infrastructure projects and connecting the country better nationa...

item.title: Assessing Measles Risks Ahead of the 2026 World Cup in Vancouver
item.description: With the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaching and hundreds of thousands of visitors expected, Vancouver faces heightened risk of measles transmission following British Columbia's worst outbreak in recent y...

item.title: Looking Back at the Romance of Carlo and Vivian in 'Lovers in Paris' (2009)
item.description: The 2009 Filipino television drama 'Lovers in Paris' captured the hearts of many viewers with its compelling love story between Carlo, played by Piolo Pascual, and Vivian, portrayed by KC Concepcion. ...

item.title: Brisbane-born adult performer Girthmasterr discusses career, OnlyFans success and age verification
item.description: Ben, better known online as Girthmasterr, is one of Australia's most prominent male adult performers, though he remains relatively unknown at home despite international recognition. Signed to one of t...

item.title: Tinubu Approves New Leadership At Maryam Babangida National Centre for Women Development
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don approve new appointments for key positions for Maryam Babangida National Centre for Women Development (MBNCWD). The main appointment na Ms. Adedayo Benjamin Laniyi wey ...

item.title: Two Gauteng Patients Hospitalised After Using Unregulated Body Enhancement Substances
item.description: Two individuals in the Ekurhuleni region of Gauteng were admitted to a public hospital after experiencing severe health complications, including organ failure, following the use of unregulated injecta...

item.title: Leicester Comedy Festival Faces Delays in Paying Performers Due to Cashflow Issues
item.description: The Leicester Comedy Festival, one of the largest comedy events in the UK, has faced significant delays in paying performers, leaving hundreds of comedians and event organisers out of pocket. The fest...

item.title: Apple Launches iOS 26.5 with Encrypted RCS Messaging and New Features
item.description: Apple has officially released iOS 26.5, available for iPhone 11 models and newer, including the latest iPhone 17 series. Users can update via Settings > General > Software Update. The long-anticipated...

item.title: Starship Block 3 Prepares for 12th Test Flight with Major Upgrades
item.description: After a seven-month hiatus, SpaceX's Starship system is scheduled for its 12th test mission (IFT-12) on May 19, 2026, marking a critical step in the development of the world's most powerful rocket. Th...

item.title: AGRA holds national ClimVAT training series in Dar es Salaam
item.description: AGRA (African Green Revolution Alliance) continues its efforts to strengthen agricultural knowledge and practices through its national ClimVAT training series in Dar es Salaam. This training program i...

item.title: Two Men Convicted and Fined for Smuggling Ethanol in Kisumu
item.description: In Kisumu, two men, Salim Ooko and Joseph Odhiambo, were each fined Sh 700,000 or risked serving two years in prison after being convicted for smuggling 8,750 litres of ethanol into Kenya. The illegal...

item.title: Tree T-PEE grows into a $100 million business after Shark Tank investment
item.description: Tree T-PEE, a water conservation product for young trees, has grown into a multi-million-dollar company since its inception in 2005 by Johnny Georges. Inspired by his father’s work in the citrus indus...

item.title: Tanzania Sees Strong Economic Growth and Prepares for TIMEXPO 2026
item.description: Tanzania is seeing positive economic movements as the IMF approved USD 375.5 million to support national growth, with GDP projected at 5.9% and inflation at 4.7% for 2026. The March 2026 monthly revie...

item.title: Three Bulls players join Simba youth squad after strong performances
item.description: The Simba youth team has been making waves recently as their performances continue to impress across local competitions. In the latest development, three players from the Bulls club have earned call-u...

item.title: Treasury flags ongoing financial management issues in municipalities
item.description: The National Treasury has reported that financial management across South African municipalities continues to be weak, with unauthorised, irregular, fruitless, and wasteful expenditure rising to R268....

item.title: Keith Richards’ Humorous T-Shirt During the Rolling Stones’ 1975 American Tour
item.description: During the Rolling Stones’ 1975 Tour of the Americas, guitarist Keith Richards wore a memorable white t-shirt with the bold statement, “Who the F*ck is Mick Jagger?” This shirt, often misunderstood as...
